title: Typing indicators omitted from offline queue — correct by design
description: Typing notifications are broadcast-only and are never enqueued in the offline queue. A contributor might suggest queuing them so offline users 'don't miss' typing events. This would be wrong: typing indicators are ephemeral and have no meaning when delivered minutes or hours later to a reconnecting client. The broadcast-only path is the correct invariant and should not be changed.
close_reason: decision recorded in beads for future contributor reference
